creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Misfiled followup to ports/168381, already committed. 

I can provide the translation: 

Hi Michael, 

sorry, I did not have time to test it. Go ahead, commit. 


Thanks 
- Frank 

----- Reply message ----- 
Von: "Michael Scheidell" <scheidell@FreeBSD.org> 
An: <bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>, <fw@moov.de> 
Betreff: ports/168381: port mail/smtp-cli, Invalid SSL_version. 
Datum: Sa., Jun. 16, 2012 12:17 

Frank: 
Can I commit this?  my tests and tests of the submitter indicate this  
fixed the problem. 
You can submit my patch to upstream if you like, and we can remove the  
second sed once they fix it. 

--  
Michael Scheidell, CTO
